items.content:
Happy to announce strategic partnership with SFT Protocol

@SFTProtocol is pioneering the SFT Chain, a 'Chain of Chains', to bridge physical infrastructure with Web3. Our DePIN platform integrates storage, computing, and a content delivery network.

⚡️ Stay connected for more updates in this partnership!
